title: Notification No.62/1994-Cus(NT), dated 21.11.1994
text: Customs ports - Appointment for specified purposes Dated 21-11-1994 Notification No. 62/94-Cus. (N.T.) In exercise of the powers conferred by clause (a) of section 7 of the Customs Act, 1962 (52 of 1962), the Central Government hereby appoints the ports specified in column (3) of the table below, situated in the State or, as the case may be, the Union territory specified in the corresponding entry in column (2) of the said table, to be Customs Port for the purposes specified in the corresponding entry in column (4) of the said table. Table S. No. STATE/UNION TERRITORY PORT PURPOSE (1) (2) (3) (4) 1. Andaman and Nicobar Nanco-wrie (1) Unloading of imported goods and the loading of export goods or any class of such goods. Port-Blair (2) Unloading of imported goods and loading of export goods or any class of such goods 2. Andhra Pradesh Kakinada (1) Unloading of Petroleum Products and loading of export goods or any class of such goods. Krishna-patnam (2) Unloading of fertilisers as upto 31st August, 1995. Masuli-patnam (3) Loading of export goods or any class of such goods. Vishaka-patnam (4) Loading of export goods or any class of such goods. 3. Daman and Diu Daman (1) and Diu Unloading of imported goods and loading of export goods or any class of such goods. 4. Goa Betul (1) Loading of mineral Ores for export. Marma-goa (2) Unloading of imported goods and loading of export goods or any class of such goods. Panaji (3) Port "(a) Unloading of imported coking coal, coke and limestone ; (b) Loading of minerals and bamboos for export." 5. Gujarat Bedi (1) (including Rozi-Jamnagar) Unloading of imported goods and loading of export goods or any class of such goods. Bhava-nagar (2) Unloading of imported goods and loading of export goods or any class of such goods. (2A) Broach Unloading of Ethylene, Vinyl Chloride Monomer, Propylene and Naphtha." -- 1 of 7 -- Dahej (3) "Unloading of imported goods and loading of export goods or any class of such goods.". (a) goods : crew (i) baggage; fertilizers, rockphosphate and"(ii) fertilizers, rock phosphate, sulphar, Ethylene, Vinyl chloride Monomer, Propylene Coal, Coke and Neptha, and"; (iii) Gandhar Gas Power Project Jhanor (Bharuch) as up to June 1995. Loading of the following export (b) goods; crew (i) baggage; machinery and equipment (ii) re-exported from Gandhar Gas Power Project Jhanor (Bharuch) as upto June 1995. (iii) Caustic soda Lye, Poly Vinyl Chloride, Chlorine Low Density Poly Ethylene (LDPE) and Poly Propylene. Div (4) Unloading of imported goods and loading of export goods or any class of such goods. Vansi-Borsi (29) Unloading of imported goods and loading of export goods or any class of such goods. -- 3 of 7 -- Varavel (30) Unloading of imported goods and loading of export goods or any class of such goods. 6. Karnataka Belekeri (1) Loading of iron and manganese ore for export. (2) Coonda- pur (Ganguly) Loading of iron and manganese ore and ferruginous bauxite for export. (3) Karwar (including Sardeshi-vagad) Unloading of imported goods and loading of export goods or any class of such goods namely :- (i)fertilizers; (ii) food-grains; (iii) rock-phosphate; (iv) timber; (v) metal scrap; (vi)edible oils; (vii) iron and steel (falling under chapters 72 and 73 of the Customs Tariff Act, 1975) (viii) liquid petroleum gas (L.P.G.); (ix) sugar; (x) cotton; (xi) minerals; (xii) raw-hides, skins and leather; (xiii) pulp of wood; (xiv) ships, boats and floating structure; and (xv) ships for breaking and unloading of crew baggage of such ships;". (b) Unloading of imported goods and loading of export goods or any class of such goods Malpe (4) Import (a) of ships for breaking and unloading of crew baggage of such ships; Loading of iron and manganese (b) ore, fish and fish products for export. Redi (6) Unloading of crew baggage and loading of metallurgical coke/coal Loading of crew baggage and (b) iron ore for export. "(b) Loading of following goods for export, namely: - Sponge Iron, (i) Rejects of Iron ore Chips" (ii) . (8) Dahanu Unloading of duty paid coal imported by M/s. BSES Ltd.". (9) Jaigad Loading of following goods for export, namely:- (i) Molasses (ii) Bauxite Ore. (10) Vijaydurg Loading of Molasses for export" 9. Orissa Bahabal-pur (1) Unloading of fertilizers. (2) Gopalpur Unloading of imported goods and loading of export goods or any class of such goods. fertilizers, dead (a) burnt magnesite and wheat. Loading of ilimanite, (b) sal-extraction, manganese ore ilimanite, synthetic rutile, zircon, monozite and rice for export. (3) Paradeep Unloading of imported goods and loading of export goods or any class of such goods. 10.
